visualization.requirement: Heat map of churn rates across tenure ranges (0-6,7-12,13-24,25+ months) and referral groups (0,1-3,4+ referrals), aggregated quarterly.
visualization.reason: Original monthly tenure bins would create excessive rows (72 bins). Grouping into meaningful retention phases and referral tiers improves pattern recognition while maintaining temporal resolution.

interaction.requirement: Multi-select filter for service attributes (unlimited_data, streaming_services) linked to stacked bar chart of churn_category distributions.
interaction.reason: Original pie chart encoding would struggle with 6 churn categories. Stacked bars better handle multiple categorical proportions while maintaining service filter relationships.

interaction.requirement: Hover tooltip on scatter plot showing customer age, tenure and detailed service adoptions.
interaction.reason: Original undefined location map conflicted with visualization requirements. Repurposing hover to show critical micro-data directly in existing core visualization.
